title: Mystical Crops
description: Mystical Crops is a mod allow growing your resources with crops. Use crops to grow essences used to make materials!
body:
Mystical Crops is a mod allow growing your resources with crops. Use crops to grow essences used to make materials!

Compatibility: SOON!
 
Wiki: https://github.com/Marwinkas/MysticalCrops/wiki/Getting-Started
